moments.title: Taylor Swift holds UK #1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack is the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1 for the week ending June 25, marking her seventh chart-topper.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Taylor Swift is holding strong at UK #1 with 'I Knew It, I Knew You'! What a week for the pop superstar.

angles.name: Toy Story 5 Success
angles.copy: Another #1 for Taylor Swift, this time from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is dominating the charts.

moments.title: Olivia Rodrigo's 'stupid song' storms chart
moments.blurb: Olivia Rodrigo's new single 'stupid song' debuted strongly, reaching Number 2 on the Official Singles Chart for the week ending June 24.

angles.name: New Hit
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo's 'stupid song' is already a massive hit, landing at Number 2 in the UK chart! Have you heard it yet?

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: It was a close call for the top spot! Olivia Rodrigo's 'stupid song' makes a huge impact, coming in at Number 2.

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup continues
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted across various UK locations, is in full swing, with the final set for July 5th in London.

angles.name: Cricket Action
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is heating up across the UK! Who are you backing to lift the trophy on July 5th?

angles.name: London Final
angles.copy: Excitement builds for the ICC Women's T20 World Cup final at Lord's on July 5th! Don't miss the action.

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships begin
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the oldest tennis tournament in the world, kicks off on June 29th in London, running until July 12th.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon starts this Monday, June 29th. Who's your pick for the title this year?

angles.name: Grass Court Grand Slam
angles.copy: The iconic grass courts of Wimbledon await! The Championships begin June 29th for two weeks of world-class tennis.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival takes place from June 27th to July 4th, featuring headliners like Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, and Michael Bublé.

angles.name: Star-studded Palace
angles.copy: Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé – the Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off this weekend! What a line-up.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Ready for some incredible live music? Blenheim Palace Festival brings huge names to a stunning setting from June 27th.

moments.title: Muse release 'The WOW! Signal'
moments.blurb: British rock band Muse are set to release their new album 'The WOW! Signal' on June 26th.

angles.name: New Muse
angles.copy: Get ready, rock fans! Muse drop their highly anticipated new album 'The WOW! Signal' this Thursday.

angles.name: Album Drop
angles.copy: Inspired by unexplained radio transmissions, Muse's new album 'The WOW! Signal' promises sci-fi dystopia and huge stadium sounds. Out June 26th!

moments.title: House Of The Dragon Season 3 now streaming
moments.blurb: Season 3 of the hit Game of Thrones prequel 'House Of The Dragon' started streaming on June 22nd on Sky Atlantic and HBO Max.

angles.name: Dragon's Return
angles.copy: The battle for Westeros continues! House Of The Dragon Season 3 is here and streaming now. Who's caught up?

angles.name: What to Watch
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge? House Of The Dragon Season 3 dropped on Monday! Get ready for more Targaryen drama.

moments.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender S2 on Netflix
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' begins streaming on Netflix on June 25th.

angles.name: New Avatar
angles.copy: Aang returns! Season 2 of 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' hits Netflix tomorrow. Who's excited?

angles.name: Netflix Drop
angles.copy: Your favourite benders are back! Catch Season 2 of Avatar: The Last Airbender on Netflix from June 25th.

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 on Disney+
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the critically acclaimed series 'The Bear' will be available to stream on Disney+ from June 26th.

angles.name: Yes, Chef!
angles.copy: Get ready for more kitchen chaos! Season 5 of 'The Bear' is coming to Disney+ this Thursday.

angles.name: Binge Watch
angles.copy: Award-winning drama 'The Bear' returns for Season 5 on Disney+ from June 26th. Clear your schedules!

moments.title: Colin Blunstone turns 81
moments.blurb: Colin Blunstone, lead singer of The Zombies and a successful solo artist, celebrates his 81st birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Colin Blunstone of The Zombies! What's your favourite of his songs?

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: From 'She's Not There' to 'Time of the Season', celebrate Colin Blunstone's 81st birthday by enjoying the timeless music of The Zombies.

moments.title: Mick Fleetwood turns 79
moments.blurb: Mick Fleetwood, the iconic drummer and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Mick Fleetwood! The heartbeat of Fleetwood Mac.

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Star
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 79th birthday to Mick Fleetwood! Celebrate with your favourite Fleetwood Mac tracks.

moments.title: John Illsley turns 77
moments.blurb: John Illsley, the bassist for the legendary rock band Dire Straits, celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Dire Straits Bassist
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to John Illsley, the incredible bassist from Dire Straits! What's your top Dire Straits track?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Cheers to John Illsley on his 77th birthday! A founding member of Dire Straits, his basslines are iconic.

moments.title: Curt Smith turns 65
moments.blurb: Curt Smith, co-founder, bassist, and vocalist of the iconic band Tears for Fears, celebrates his 65th birthday today.

angles.name: Tears for Fears Star
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Curt Smith of Tears for Fears! What's your favourite song from the legendary duo?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Shout out to Curt Smith on his 65th birthday! From 'Everybody Wants To Rule The World' to 'Shout', his voice defined a generation.

moments.title: Andy McCluskey turns 67
moments.blurb: Andy McCluskey, the co-founder, lead singer, and bassist of Orchestral Manoeuvres in the Dark (OMD), celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: OMD's Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Andy McCluskey, the voice of OMD! What's your go-to synth-pop classic from the band?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 67th birthday to Andy McCluskey! His work with OMD shaped the sound of the 80s.

moments.title: Hope Sandoval turns 60
moments.blurb: Hope Sandoval, the enigmatic lead singer of Mazzy Star, celebrates her 60th birthday today.

angles.name: Mazzy Star Voice
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to the incredible Hope Sandoval of Mazzy Star! Her unique voice is truly unforgettable.

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 60th Birthday to Hope Sandoval! Dive into the dreamy soundscapes of Mazzy Star today.

moments.title: Solange Knowles turns 39
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning singer, songwriter, and artist Solange Knowles celebrates her 39th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Solange
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 39th Birthday to the incredibly talented Solange Knowles! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Music & Style Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Solange Knowles! Celebrating 39 years of groundbreaking music and iconic style.

moments.title: Deborah Harry turns 81
moments.blurb: Deborah Harry, the legendary frontwoman of Blondie, will celebrate her 81st birthday on July 1st. Born July 1, 1945.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Deborah Harry of Blondie turns 81 on July 1st. What's your favourite Blondie hit? #DeborahHarry

angles.name: Happy Birthday Debbie
angles.copy: The one and only Deborah Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st! A true music pioneer. #DebbieHarry

moments.title: Missy Elliott turns 55
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum and Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott will celebrate her 55th birthday on July 1st. Born July 1, 1971.

angles.name: Queen of Hip-Hop
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st. What's your favourite track from the icon? #MissyElliott

angles.name: Happy Birthday Missy
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Missy Elliott who turns 55 on July 1st! A true trailblazer in music. #MusicIcon

moments.title: Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Vince Clarke, the influential electronic musician and songwriter known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, will celebrate his 66th birthday on July 3rd. Born July 3, 1960.

angles.name: Synth Pop Genius
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary Vince Clarke on July 3rd! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his influence is undeniable. #VinceClarke

angles.name: Electronic Music Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 66th birthday to Vince Clarke! Celebrate the genius behind some of the greatest synth-pop hits on July 3rd. #DepecheMode

moments.title: British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix is set to take place at Silverstone from July 2nd to 5th.

angles.name: F1 Action
angles.copy: Start your engines! The British Grand Prix roars into Silverstone from July 2nd. Who's your pick for the podium?

angles.name: Silverstone Spectacle
angles.copy: The biggest event in British motorsport is almost here! The British Grand Prix takes over Silverstone from July 2nd.
